findings.description: Section s5 has content "なし" with no basis in the source. The source's 設定項目・拡張ポイント section body only states "本ハンドラに設定項目は設けられていない。" followed by the XML configuration example. There is no separate subsection or statement asserting that extension points are absent.
findings.source_evidence: 設定項目・拡張ポイント section: "本ハンドラに設定項目は設けられていない。" — no mention of extension points being absent as a distinct statement

findings.description: Section s5 contains fewer than 50 characters (content is "なし", 3 characters). This section appears to be a spurious extra split with no corresponding source heading or content block.
findings.source_evidence: The source has 3 h2 sections (概要, ハンドラ処理フロー, 設定項目・拡張ポイント) with no subsection between ハンドラ処理フロー and 設定項目・拡張ポイント that would justify s5 as a separate section.
